code:
import io
import string

fn toggle_byte(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    b + 32
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    b - 32
  else
    b
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut result = ""
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        let t = toggle_byte(b)
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(t)}"
      when None
        result = result
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
